bio: design engineer building for the web — bespoke interfaces, platforms, and design systems. been at it since the 90s. based in las vegas, independent, running [third index](https://thirdindex.co) — a small design and engineering studio. currently building [bankroll.fyi](https://bankroll.fyi).

timeline.title: third index
timeline.description: studio practice. building product interfaces, web platforms, and the systems behind them. client work across fintech, commerce, and creative teams, alongside original products.

timeline.title: modern treasury
timeline.description: designed and built interfaces for an enterprise fintech platform processing billions in payments annually. contributed to motion patterns, component systems, and headless cms infrastructure.

timeline.title: metropolis
timeline.description: built smart contract deployment tooling (metal.build) and dao governance products (pod.xyz). worked across evm-compatible dapps, farcaster integrations, and frontend architecture for web3.

timeline.title: freelance
timeline.description: contract work across agencies, publishers, consumer brands, and fintech. clients included elara pictures, amazon, pentagram, and axoni. built platforms across marketplaces, editorial systems, and product interfaces.

timeline.title: vice media
timeline.description: led a team of 10 building the publishing platform for vice, noisey, motherboard, and munchies. migrated from a legacy lamp stack to react and established component systems and frontend standards.

timeline.title: condé nast
timeline.description: developed responsive sites for gq, wired, and architectural digest. collaborated with internal teams, global brands, and agencies on editorial features and digital campaigns.
